Weapons — Male Human Rogue: 7
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Lawful Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength Experience: 31379/34000 Level: 7 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General; Origin Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Archery; Magic Initiate (Wizard) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Armor Training (Light); Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Evasion; Expertise; Fast Hands; Reliable Talent; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Sneak Attack; Steady Aim; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming)
Feature Notes:
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Athletics; Intimidation; Investigation; Nature; Performance
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +5 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +7
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +7 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +5 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +4 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +4 Nature: (int) +5 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Tool Proficiency: Dragonchess Set: (wis); Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Undercommon
Skill Notes:
Expertise: +3 on 4 chosen proficient skills
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Choose 1 from any)
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool checks
Second-Story Work: +1' running jump distance
Thieves'Cant: Understands jargon and signs known only by rogues
Combat
Hit Points: 34 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+1 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Topple); Blowgun (+2 1+2 P R25/100; Vex); Club (+4 1d4+1 B; Slow); Dagger (+5 1d4+2 P R20/60; Nick); Dart (+5 1d4+2 P R20/60; Vex); Flail (+1 1d8+1 B; Sap); Glaive (+1 1d10+1 S; Graze); Greataxe (+1 1d12+1 S; Cleave); Greatclub (+4 1d8+1 B; Push); Greatsword (+1 2d6+1 S; Graze); Halberd (+1 1d10+1 S; Cleave); Hand Crossbow (+5 1d6+2 P R30/120; Vex); Handaxe (+4 1d6+1 S R20/60; Vex); Heavy Crossbow (+2 1d10+2 P R100/400; Push); Javelin (+4 1d6+1 P R30/120; Slow); Lance (+1 1d10+1 P; Topple); Light Crossbow (+5 1d8+2 P R80/320; Slow); Light Hammer (+4 1d4+1 B R20/60; Nick); Longbow (+2 1d8+2 P R150/600; Slow); Longsword (+1 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Sap); Mace (+4 1d6+1 B; Sap); Maul (+1 2d6+1 B; Topple); Morningstar (+1 1d8+1 P; Sap); Musket (+2 1d12+2 P R40/120; Slow); Pike (+1 1d10+1 P; Push); Pistol (+2 1d10+2 P R30/90; Vex); Quarterstaff (+4 1d6+1 B [2h d8]; Topple); Rapier (+5 1d8+2 P; Vex); Scimitar (+5 1d6+2 S; Nick); Shortbow (+5 1d6+2 P R80/320; Vex); Shortsword (+5 1d6+2 S; Vex); Sickle (+4 1d4+1 S; Nick); Sling (+5 1d4+2 B R30/120; Slow); Spear (+4 1d6+1 P [2h d8] R20/60; Sap); Trident (+1 1d8+1 P [2h d10] R20/60; Topple); Unarmed (+4 1+1 B); War Pick (+1 1d8+1 P [2h d10]; Sap); Warhammer (+1 1d8+1 B [2h d10]; Push); Whip (+5 1d4+2 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +7
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict a choice of: poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sneak Attack: Inflicts +4d6 HP on attacks with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature once per turn
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +5; Intelligence: +5; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes: Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Magic
Attack: W: +5 Spell DC: W: 13
Magic Notes: Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Notes
